info.title: Netcare Health OS API
info.description:
Complete API reference for Netcare Health OS — an AI-powered healthcare operating system for South African medical practices.

Covers: Authentication, Patient Management, Bookings, Invoicing, Claims Analysis, Healthbridge Switching, CareOn Bridge (HL7v2), Network Analytics, Reporting, WhatsApp Channels, and Notifications.

All routes are rate-limited. Most require JWT session authentication via HTTP-only cookies. Platform admin routes require `platform_admin` role.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication — login, registration, password reset, session management

tags.name: Team
tags.description: Team member management — invite, update roles, deactivate, activity logs (admin only)

tags.name: Patients
tags.description: Patient CRUD — demographics, allergies, medications, medical records, vitals, CSV import

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Appointment booking lifecycle — create, update, approve/reject, cancel

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice management — create, list, PDF generation, CSV export

tags.name: Claims Analyzer
tags.description: AI-powered claims validation — CSV upload, ICD-10/tariff validation, auto-correction, AI suggestions, rejection patterns, POPIA retention

tags.name: Healthbridge
tags.description: SA medical aid switching — claim submission, eligibility checks, eRA reconciliation, NAPPI lookup, AI coding, batch processing

tags.name: Switching
tags.description: Multi-switch routing engine — EDIFACT generation, pre-auth, batch submission, eRA parsing, resubmission, FamCheck, vendor accreditation

tags.name: CareOn Bridge
tags.description: CareOn HL7v2 integration — real-time advisories, message log, webhook for HL7 messages, advisory resolution

tags.name: Bridge
tags.description: Platform-level integration status across all connected systems

tags.name: Network
tags.description: Network-wide analytics — KPIs, clinic performance, scheme metrics, rejection analysis (platform_admin only)

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Report generation, scheduling, history, and cron execution (platform_admin only)

tags.name: Performance
tags.description: Cross-product performance metrics — claims, switching, bridge, WhatsApp, FHIR (platform_admin only)

tags.name: WhatsApp
tags.description: WhatsApp messaging — send, broadcast, clinic directory, incoming webhook with intent detection

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Notification management — WhatsApp, SMS, email notifications with template support

sessionCookie.name: session
sessionCookie.description: JWT session cookie set by /api/auth/login. HTTP-only, secure.

cronSecret.description: CRON_SECRET for scheduled/cron endpoints. Passed as Bearer token.

hmacAuth.name: X-Hub-Signature-256
hmacAuth.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature for CareOn Bridge webhook authentication

401.description: Not authenticated — session cookie missing or expired

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient role or missing POPIA consent

post.summary: Log in with email and password
post.description: Authenticates user credentials and sets an HTTP-only session cookie. Rate limited to 10 requests/minute per IP.
Creates a new user account and sets session cookie. Rate limited to 5 requests/minute per IP. Sends signup alert emails.
Sends a password reset link via Resend. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration. Token expires in 1 hour. Rate limited to 5/minute.
Accepts the token from the reset email and sets a new password. Password must be at least 8 characters. Rate limited to 10/minute.

get.description: Returns the current user profile and practice info from the session cookie.

post.description: Clears the session cookie.

get.description: Returns all team members for the authenticated user's practice. Requires admin or platform_admin role.

post.description: Creates a new user with a temporary password and sends a welcome email via Resend. Requires admin role.

patch.description: Updates role, status, or name. Validates role against whitelist.

delete.description: Soft-deletes (sets status to inactive). Cannot deactivate yourself.

get.summary: Get activity log for a team member
get.description: Returns the last 50 audit log entries for the specified team member.
Returns paginated patient list with allergies and active medications. Requires POPIA data_processing consent. Supports search and status filter.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone

post.description: Creates a new patient record. Name and phone are required.

get.description: Returns patient with allergies, medications, last 20 medical records, and last 10 vitals.
Returns medical records for a patient. Optional type filter.

post.description: All numeric fields are clamped to safe physiological ranges.
Accepts an array of patient rows. Auto-extracts DOB and gender from SA ID numbers. Skips duplicates by phone. Rate limited to 5/minute.

get.description: Returns paginated bookings for the practice ordered by scheduled date.

post.description: Approves or rejects a pending booking. Sends WhatsApp and email notifications to the patient.

400.description: Invalid action or booking not pending

get.description: Returns paginated invoices with payment records.
Generates and returns a PDF document for the specified invoice.
Returns a CSV file of all invoices. Supports date range and status filters.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status. Use 'all' for no filter.

post.description: Accepts CSV (multipart or JSON body), validates ICD-10, tariff codes, scheme rules, unbundling violations, and generates auto-corrections. Max 10,000 rows. Auto-detects Healthbridge format. Rate limited to 30/minute.

scheme.description: Medical aid scheme code for scheme-specific rules

200.description: Validation result with issues, auto-corrections, and summary

400.description: No file, no data, or too many rows

post.description: Uploads CSV, validates, applies high-confidence auto-corrections, and returns corrected CSV with before/after comparison. Rate limited to 15/minute.

get.summary: Search ICD-10, NAPPI, or tariff codes
get.description: Lightweight search endpoint for code lookups. Rate limited to 60/minute. No auth required beyond rate limit.

post.description: Uses AI to suggest correct ICD-10 codes or explain rejection reasons. Rate limited to 20/minute (AI calls cost money).
Generates a PDF report from validation results. Rate limited to 10/minute.

get.summary: List saved analyses with trend data
get.description: Returns past analyses for the practice with 6-month trend data. Rate limited to 30/minute.

post.description: Stores analysis result with PII sanitized for POPIA compliance.

get.description: Analyzes historical analyses to extract rejection patterns, generate insights, and optionally predict rejection for a specific code.

parameters.name: predict
parameters.description: ICD-10 code to predict rejection probability

get.description: Returns global and practice-specific validation rules.

post.summary: Create or update a validation rule

get.description: Aggregated claims metrics across all practices. Platform admin only.
Deletes analyses older than 12 months for POPIA compliance. Triggered by Vercel cron with CRON_SECRET.
Returns claims for the practice. Supports status and scheme filters.

post.summary: Submit a claim to the medical aid switch
post.description: Validates ICD-10 and CPT codes, builds XML, submits to configured switch (Healthbridge/MediKredit/MediSwitch). Falls back to draft if switch fails.

submit.description: Set false to save as draft

400.description: Validation error (invalid ICD-10, missing line items, etc.)

patch.summary: Update, resubmit, or reverse a claim
patch.description: Supports actions: resubmit (for rejected/draft claims), reverse (cancel an accepted claim), or general update (notes, status).

action.description: Optional action. Omit for general update.

post.description: Verifies medical aid membership, option, remaining benefits, and pre-auth requirements.
Fetches eRAs from the switch for a date range and auto-reconciles payments against submitted claims.
Matches unreconciled eRA payments against submitted claims by transaction ref and membership+date fallback.
Validates a claim before submission. Returns errors, warnings, PMB/CDL detection, and rejection risk score.

get.description: Revenue breakdown per medical aid scheme, acceptance/rejection rates, average days to payment, and outstanding claims aging (30/60/90/120+ days).

post.description: Estimates patient cost breakdown: medical aid portion, co-pay, gap cover.

get.summary: NAPPI code and medicine price lookup
get.description: Searches NAPPI codes via medicineprices.org.za API. Returns medicine name, NAPPI code, Single Exit Price, dispensing fee, schedule.

post.summary: AI-powered ICD-10 + CPT code suggestion from clinical notes
post.description: Accepts clinical notes text and returns suggested ICD-10 and CPT codes with PMB/CDL flags, confidence levels, and reasoning. Uses Gemini 2.5 Flash.

post.summary: AI auto-fill claim from clinical notes
post.description: Accepts free-text clinical notes and returns a complete structured claim with ICD-10, CPT, amounts, and clinical summary. Min 20 chars.
Predicts rejection probability, risk factors, and recommendations for a claim before submission.

get.summary: Generate follow-up actions for outstanding claims
get.description: Returns prioritized follow-up actions with draft emails and scheme contacts for all outstanding claims.

post.description: Accepts CSV content, validates all rows, and optionally submits valid claims. Max 500 rows. Rate limited to 10/minute.

400.description: CSV parse error or too many rows

get.description: Exports claims data as CSV with period, status, and scheme filters.
Returns Healthbridge integration config, switch status, stats, AI coder status, and reference data (medical aid schemes, ICD-10, CPT, place of service, rejection codes).

get.summary: Get switch routing for a scheme or all switch statuses

parameters.name: scheme
parameters.description: Medical aid scheme name. Omit to get all switch statuses.

200.description: Routing info or switch status list

post.summary: Submit a claim through the routed switch
post.description: Routes claim to the correct switch (Healthbridge/MediKredit/SwitchOn) and submits. Persists result to database.

post.summary: Generate EDIFACT MEDCLM message from claim
post.description: Generates PHISC MEDCLM v0:912:ZA EDIFACT message and validates it.

put.description: Parses raw EDIFACT string into structured data. Supports claim and response types.

post.description: Creates pre-auth request with XML for switch submission. Supports action: 'check' for quick check.

post.summary: Submit batch of claims or generate batch EDIFACT
post.description: Processes up to 500 claims. mode=edifact generates a batch EDIFACT file without submission. mode=submit processes and submits all claims.

200.description: Batch job result with per-claim status

post.summary: Parse eRA XML and reconcile payments
post.description: Parses electronic remittance advice XML document, matches against existing claims, and generates dispute items for underpayments.

200.description: Parsed eRA with reconciliation and disputes

post.description: Actions: analyze (single rejection analysis), autofix (auto-fix a claim), categorize (bulk categorization), or create resubmission.

200.description: Analysis, auto-fix result, categorization, or resubmission

post.description: Actions: famcheck (full member & family download), authcheck (pre-auth requirements), eligibility (quick benefit check via routed switch).

400.description: Missing required fields or invalid action

get.summary: Get vendor accreditation test suite info
get.description: Returns accreditation process documentation and list of all test cases for PMS vendor accreditation.

post.description: Registers a vendor and returns a vendor code, accreditation summary, and next steps.

get.summary: Get CareOn Bridge data by view
get.description: Returns bridge stats, advisories, messages, connection status, resolution stats, anomalies, or audit log. All access is logged for POPIA compliance.

post.description: Webhook endpoint for CareOn HL7v2 messages. Supports HMAC-SHA256 and Bearer token authentication. Processes HL7 messages and generates clinical advisories. AI-enhanced processing if Gemini key is available.

patch.description: Resolves an advisory with an action: resolve, generate_claim, notify_doctor, dismiss.

400.description: Invalid action or advisory not found

get.description: Returns status of all connected systems (Healthbridge, CareOn, etc.). Platform admin only.
Returns analytics data based on tab parameter. Platform admin only.

200.description: Analytics data for the requested tab

get.description: Aggregated performance across claims, switching, bridge, WhatsApp, and FHIR. Platform admin only.

post.description: Generates one of 6 report types in JSON or CSV format. Platform admin only.

get.description: Checks which scheduled reports are due, generates them, and (in production) emails to recipients. Triggered daily at 7 AM by Vercel cron.

post.description: Sends a WhatsApp message to a phone number via Twilio.
Sends a message to all patients with phone numbers, or filtered by upcoming bookings. Rate limited to 5/minute.

get.summary: Get clinic directory or find nearest clinics
get.description: Returns full clinic directory or finds nearest clinics by coordinates and optional service filter.
Verification endpoint for WhatsApp Cloud API webhook setup. Returns the challenge if verify_token matches.

post.description: Processes incoming WhatsApp messages with intent detection (emergency, find_clinic, book_appointment, repeat_prescription, general). Routes through AI triage and conversation pipeline. Rate limited to 100/minute.

200.description: Processing result with intent and conversation ID

get.description: Returns paginated notifications for the practice.

post.description: Creates and queues a notification (WhatsApp, SMS, or email).
